changes: Added War News button opening News/Reddit how topics
Fixed /api/stats 404 error - statistics now load correctly
Fixed PDF upload - PDFs now appear in library immediately
News and Reddit now preload at startup - instant display when opening panels
Optimized image loading with base64 conversion and smart caching
Single .exe deployment - all databases embedded, auto-setup on first run
Fixed UI cache — app now always loads the latest version after update
Theme preference (light/dark) now saved to disk instead of browser cache
Fixed UI not updating after app update
Shopping List with QR code and auto-sync
Search works in both Collection and Shopping List
Fixed theme toggle and What's New button
Various bug fixes and UI improvements
